title: a8-claw extension registry manifest
description: Curated catalog of channels, MCPs, tool families, and runtime peers that a8-claw can wire on request. Ships with the runtime; refreshable from a remote URL (future). Each entry declares a three-axis default approval policy that tenant admins can override.

version.description: Manifest schema version, semver-major when breaking.

id.description: Stable identifier — used by ./a8-claw add <id> and by add_mcp_server registry lookup.

name.description: Human-readable name shown in the picker UI.

category.description: Grouping for the picker: comms, knowledge, code, issues, data, compute, research, delegation, …

install.description: Type-specific install instructions. channel → adapter source ref + npm package + barrel import. mcp_http/sse → url + header template. mcp_stdio → command/args. tool_family → tool_manager_family or native flag. runtime_peer → runtime_id + dispatch_via.

credentials_env.description: Env-var names the entry needs at runtime. Resolved from OneCLI vault (mission mode) or .env (standalone). Empty for platform-creded surfaces.

InstallGate.description: auto = pre-vetted, no human gate. admin = single admin DM approval. compliance = compliance officer + enhanced audit. deny = blocked in this tenant's policy.

scoped.description: Per-operation override. Key = MCP tool name (e.g. 'notion_delete_page'); value overrides 'default'.

cost_gated_above_cents.description: v2: auto-approve invocations under this cost; prompt above. Requires metering hook integration.

session_seconds.description: Per-session approvals expire after this many seconds.

absolute_seconds.description: Tenant-scoped approvals expire after this many seconds since grant.
